message:
feat: inject workspace context into system prompt

The model now starts every session with full workspace awareness:
- Directory tree (files and structure)
- Test files explicitly called out ("run these to verify your work")
- Build system info (Makefile targets, package.json scripts, etc.)

This eliminates the discovery round tax and ensures both the agent
and reviewer know about test files from the start — addressing the
#1 reviewer-approved-wrong pattern where the reviewer didn't find
or run existing test suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
